tasks.subject: Task 1: Pre-clean dev/extractions/ before W1 dispatch (#46)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add two rm -f lines before Step 6 dispatch to eliminate stale batch files from prior catalog runs.

**Files:**
- Modify: `skills/catalog-sources/SKILL.md` — add rm -f lines after `mkdir -p "$STACK/dev/extractions"` (~line 230)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `batch-*-concepts.md` and `_dedup*.md` absent at W1 start
- [ ] Zero-sources early-exit path unaffected
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated, patch version bumped

**Verify:** `grep -n "rm -f" skills/catalog-sources/SKILL.md` → two rm -f lines in Step 6 section

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/catalog-sources/SKILL.md", ".claude-plugin/plugin.json", ".claude-plugin/marketplace.json", "CHANGELOG.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -n 'rm -f' skills/catalog-sources/SKILL.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["rm -f batch-*-concepts.md present", "rm -f _dedup*.md present", "patch version bumped", "CHANGELOG entry added"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Move per-slug split into dedup-extractions.py (#49, closes #48)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Eliminate the awk per-slug split from SKILL.md by having dedup-extractions.py write per-slug files directly.

**Files:**
- Modify: `scripts/dedup-extractions.py` — add per-slug file writes after _dedup-meta.txt write
- Modify: `skills/catalog-sources/SKILL.md` — remove awk for-loop (~lines 289-309), update prose comment

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Per-slug files written by Python, not awk
- [ ] Awk for-loop absent from SKILL.md
- [ ] Each per-slug file has exactly one `## Concept:` block
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated, minor version bumped

**Verify:** `grep -n 'awk.*want' skills/catalog-sources/SKILL.md` → no output

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/dedup-extractions.py", "skills/catalog-sources/SKILL.md", ".claude-plugin/plugin.json", ".claude-plugin/marketplace.json", "CHANGELOG.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -n 'awk.*want' skills/catalog-sources/SKILL.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["per-slug writes in dedup-extractions.py", "awk for-loop removed", "minor version bumped", "CHANGELOG entry added"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Re-run wikilink-pass.sh after A1 validator wave (#44)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add wikilink-pass.sh call after A1 cleanup in audit-stack so wikilinks stripped by the validator are restored before A2.

**Files:**
- Modify: `skills/audit-stack/SKILL.md` — add wikilink-pass.sh call after A1 cleanup (~line 187)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] wikilink-pass.sh called after A1 in audit-stack skill
- [ ] Two wikilink-pass.sh call sites in SKILL.md
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated, patch version bumped

**Verify:** `grep -n 'wikilink-pass' skills/audit-stack/SKILL.md` → two lines

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/audit-stack/SKILL.md", ".claude-plugin/plugin.json", ".claude-plugin/marketplace.json", "CHANGELOG.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -n 'wikilink-pass' skills/audit-stack/SKILL.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["wikilink-pass.sh after A1 cleanup", "two call sites total", "patch version bumped", "CHANGELOG entry added"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Fuzzy claim match in reconcile-findings.py (#47)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Sentence-level fuzzy match gated on [VERIFIED]/[DRIFT] closes rewritten findings instead of dropping them.

**Files:**
- Modify: `scripts/reconcile-findings.py` — add difflib import, _fuzzy_rewrite_check(), update occurrences==0 branch, add count key, update print, update docstring

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Rewritten-then-VERIFIED findings close with rewrite-then-verify note
- [ ] Unverified rewrites remain unchanged
- [ ] Only stdlib (difflib) added
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated, minor version bumped

**Verify:** `grep -n '_fuzzy_rewrite_check' scripts/reconcile-findings.py` → function definition present

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/reconcile-findings.py", ".claude-plugin/plugin.json", ".claude-plugin/marketplace.json", "CHANGELOG.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -n '_fuzzy_rewrite_check' scripts/reconcile-findings.py", "acceptanceCriteria": ["_fuzzy_rewrite_check present", "difflib imported", "closed-rewrite-verified count key present", "minor version bumped", "CHANGELOG entry added"]}
```
